pr.title: Improved baseline: recurrent depth + LoRA + MTP

output.summary: Depth recurrence with LoRA and learned scales plus SwiGLU and EMA fixes yields a wider effective 10-layer baseline.
techniques: Reused five unique blocks twice for depth recurrence with per-loop learned scales
Per-recurrence rank-16 LoRA adapters on attention Q/K/V/O for specialization
SwiGLU MLP plus multi-token auxiliary heads and EMA serialization fix
